---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or not working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Expected behavior

What you thought should happen.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Environment

- OS: [Windows 11 / macOS 14.5 / Ubuntu 22.04 / etc.]
- Node version: [output of `node --version`]
- Firebase tools version: [output of `firebase --version`]
- Browser (if frontend issue): [Chrome 132, Safari 18, etc.]
- Mobile or desktop: [desktop / iOS Safari / Android Chrome]
- Suppa-agent version (from `constants.js` or `package.json`): [v0.001]

## Logs

If applicable, paste the relevant logs from:
- The browser console (F12 → Console tab)
- The Code Tester (the green floating console)
- Firebase function logs (`firebase functions:log`)

```
paste here
```

## Anything else

Screenshots, config snippets, what you've tried, etc.
